BIRD_FACED_URN_RELIC.title: Bird-Faced Urn
BIRD_FACED_URN_RELIC.description: Whenever you play a [gold]Power[/gold] card, heal [blue]{Heal}[/blue] HP.
BLUE_CANDLE_RELIC.title: Blue Candle
BLUE_CANDLE_RELIC.description:
[gold]Unplayable[/gold] Curse cards can now be played.

Whenever you play a Curse, lose [blue]1[/blue] HP and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.
BUSTED_CROWN_RELIC.title: Busted Crown
BUSTED_CROWN_RELIC.description: Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the start of your turn. Future card rewards have [blue]2[/blue] fewer cards to choose from.
BUSTED_CROWN_RELIC.flavor: The Champ's crown... or a pale imitation?
CALIPERS_RELIC.title: Calipers
CALIPERS_RELIC.description: At the start of your turn, lose [blue]{BlockLoss}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] rather than all of your [gold]Block[/gold].
CERAMIC_FISH_RELIC.title: Ceramic Fish
CERAMIC_FISH_RELIC.description: Whenever you add a card to your deck, gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].
CLASSIC_BRONZE_SCALES.title: Bronze Scales
CLASSIC_BRONZE_SCALES.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]{ThornsPower}[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold].
CLASSIC_NUNCHAKU.title: Nunchaku
CLOCKWORK_SOUVENIR_RELIC.title: Clockwork Souvenir
COFFEE_DRIPPER_RELIC.title: Coffee Dripper
COFFEE_DRIPPER_RELIC.description: Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the start of your turn. You can no longer [gold]Rest[/gold] at Rest Sites.
COFFEE_DRIPPER_RELIC.flavor: "Yes, another cup please. Back to work. Back to work!" - The Architect
CURSED_KEY_RELIC.title: Cursed Key
CURSED_KEY_RELIC.description: Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the start of your turn. Whenever you open a non-Boss chest, obtain a Curse.
CURSED_KEY_RELIC.flavor: You can feel the malicious energy emanating from the key. Power comes at a price.
DEAD_BRANCH_RELIC.title: Dead Branch
DEAD_BRANCH_RELIC.description: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, add a random card into your hand.
DEAD_BRANCH_RELIC.flavor: The branch of a tree from a forgotten era.
DU_VU_DOLL_RELIC.title: Du-Vu Doll
DU_VU_DOLL_RELIC.description: For each Curse in your deck, start each combat with [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
FOSSILIZED_HELIX_RELIC.title: Fossilized Helix
FOSSILIZED_HELIX_RELIC.description: Prevent the first time you would lose HP each combat.
FOSSILIZED_HELIX_RELIC.flavor: Seemingly indestructible, you wonder what kind of creature this belonged to.
FROZEN_EYE_RELIC.title: Frozen Eye
FROZEN_EYE_RELIC.description: When viewing your [gold]Draw[/gold] [gold]Pile[/gold], the cards are now shown in order.
FROZEN_EYE_RELIC.flavor: Staring into the eye, you see a glimpse of your future.
FUSION_HAMMER_RELIC.title: Fusion Hammer
FUSION_HAMMER_RELIC.description: Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the start of your turn. You can no longer [gold]Smith[/gold] at Rest Sites.
FUSION_HAMMER_RELIC.flavor: Once wielded, the owner can never let go.
GINGER_RELIC.title: Ginger
GINGER_RELIC.flavor: A potent tool in many tonics.
INCENSE_BURNER_RELIC.title: Incense Burner
INCENSE_BURNER_RELIC.flavor: The smoke imbues its owner with the spirit of the burned.
INK_BOTTLE_RELIC.title: Ink Bottle
INK_BOTTLE_RELIC.description: Whenever you play [blue]10[/blue] cards, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
INK_BOTTLE_RELIC.flavor: Once exhausted, appears to refill itself in a different color.
INSERTER.title: Inserter
MAGIC_FLOWER_RELIC.title: Magic Flower
MAGIC_FLOWER_RELIC.description: Healing is [blue]50[/blue]% more effective during combat.
MAGIC_FLOWER_RELIC.flavor: A flower long thought extinct, somehow preserved in perfect condition.
MARK_OF_PAIN.title: Mark of Pain
MARK_OF_PAIN.description: Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the start of your turn. At the start of combat, shuffle [blue]2[/blue] Wounds into your draw pile.
MARK_OF_PAIN.flavor: This brand was used by the northern tribes to signify warriors who had mastered pain in battle.
MATRYOSHKA_RELIC.title: Matryoshka
MATRYOSHKA_RELIC.description: The next [blue]{ChestsLeft}[/blue] non-Boss chests you open contain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Relics[/gold].
MEDICAL_KIT_RELIC.title: Medical Kit
MEDICAL_KIT_RELIC.description: [gold]Unplayable[/gold] [gold]Status[/gold] cards can now be played. Whenever you play a [gold]Status[/gold] card, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.
MEDICAL_KIT_RELIC.flavor: "Has everything you need! Anti-itch, anti-burn, anti-venom, and more!"
NUCLEAR_BATTERY.title: Nuclear Battery
NUCLEAR_BATTERY.description: At the start of each combat, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Plasma[/gold].
OMAMORI_RELIC.title: Omamori
OMAMORI_RELIC.description: Negate the next [blue]{Negates}[/blue] Curses you obtain.
ORANGE_PELLETS_RELIC.title: Orange Pellets
ORANGE_PELLETS_RELIC.description: Whenever you play a [gold]Power[/gold], [gold]Attack[/gold], and [gold]Skill[/gold] in the same turn, remove all of your debuffs.
ORANGE_PELLETS_RELIC.flavor: "Made from various fungi found throughout the Spire, they will stave off any affliction."
PEACE_PIPE_RELIC.title: Peace Pipe
PEACE_PIPE_RELIC.description: You can now remove cards from your deck at Rest Sites.
PEACE_PIPE_RELIC.flavor: Clears the mind and cleanses the soul.
PRESERVED_INSECT_RELIC.title: Preserved Insect
PRESERVED_INSECT_RELIC.description: Enemies in Elite combats have [blue]{HpReductionPercent}[/blue]% less HP.
PRISMATIC_SHARD_RELIC.title: Prismatic Shard
PRISMATIC_SHARD_RELIC.description: Combat reward screens now contain Colorless cards and cards from other colors.
PRISMATIC_SHARD_RELIC.flavor: Looking through the shard, you are able to see entirely new perspectives.
QUESTION_CARD_RELIC.title: Question Card
QUESTION_CARD_RELIC.description: Future card rewards have [blue]1[/blue] additional card to choose from.
QUESTION_CARD_RELIC.flavor: "Those with more choices minimize the downside to chaos." - Kublai the Great
RING_OF_THE_SERPENT.title: Ring of the Serpent
RING_OF_THE_SERPENT.description: Replaces Ring of the Snake. At the start of your turn, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card.
RUNIC_CUBE_RELIC.title: Runic Cube
RUNIC_CUBE_RELIC.description: Whenever you lose HP, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
RUNIC_DOME_RELIC.title: Runic Dome
RUNIC_DOME_RELIC.description: Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the start of your turn. You can no longer see enemy intents.
SACRED_BARK_RELIC.title: Sacred Bark
SACRED_BARK_RELIC.flavor: A bark rumored to originate from the World tree.
SINGING_BOWL_RELIC.title: Singing Bowl
SINGING_BOWL_RELIC.description: When adding cards into your deck, you may raise your Max HP by [blue]2[/blue] instead.
SINGING_BOWL_RELIC.flavor: This well-used artifact rings out with a beautiful melody when struck.
SLAVERS_COLLAR_RELIC.title: Slaver's Collar
SLAVERS_COLLAR_RELIC.description: During Boss and Elite combats, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the start of your turn.
SMILING_MASK_RELIC.title: Smiling Mask
SMILING_MASK_RELIC.description: The Merchant's card removal service now always costs [blue]50[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].
STRANGE_SPOON_RELIC.title: Strange Spoon
STRANGE_SPOON_RELIC.description: Cards which [gold]Exhaust[/gold] when played will instead discard [blue]50[/blue]% of the time.
STRANGE_SPOON_RELIC.flavor: Staring at the spoon, it appears to bend and twist around before your eyes.
SUNDIAL_RELIC.title: Sundial
SUNDIAL_RELIC.description: Every [blue]{Shuffles}[/blue] times you shuffle your draw pile, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}.
THREAD_AND_NEEDLE_RELIC.title: Thread and Needle
THREAD_AND_NEEDLE_RELIC.description: Start each combat with [blue]4[/blue] Plated Armor.
TINY_CHEST_RELIC.title: Tiny Chest
TINY_HOUSE_RELIC.title: Tiny House
TINY_HOUSE_RELIC.description:
Upon pickup, obtain [blue]1[/blue] potion. 
 Gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold]. 
 Raise your Max HP by [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]. 
 Obtain [blue]1[/blue] card. 
 Upgrade [blue]1[/blue] random card.
TINY_HOUSE_RELIC.flavor: "A near perfect implementation of miniaturization. My finest work to date, but still not adequate." - The Architect
TORII_RELIC.title: Torii
TORII_RELIC.description: Whenever you would receive [blue]5[/blue] or less unblocked [gold]Attack[/gold] damage, reduce it to [blue]1[/blue].
TOY_ORNITHOPTER_RELIC.title: Toy Ornithopter
TOY_ORNITHOPTER_RELIC.description: Whenever you use a potion, heal [blue]{Heal}[/blue] HP.
TURNIP_RELIC.title: Turnip
CHAMPION_BELT.title: Champion Belt
WRIST_BLADE.title: Wrist Blade
WRIST_BLADE.description: Attacks that cost 0 deal {ExtraDamage} additional damage.
HOVERING_KITE.title: Hovering Kite
HOVERING_KITE.description: The first time you discard a card each turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
THE_SPECIMEN.title: The Specimen
THE_SPECIMEN.description: Whenever an enemy dies, transfer any [gold]Poison[/gold] it has to a random enemy.
FROZEN_CORE.title: Frozen Core
FROZEN_CORE.description: If you end your turn with any empty [gold]Orb[/gold] slots, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Frost[/gold].
BOTTLED_FLAME_RELIC.title: Bottled Flame
BOTTLED_FLAME_RELIC.description: Upon pickup, choose an [gold]Attack[/gold] in your [gold]Deck[/gold] to [gold]Enchant[/gold] with [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple].
BOTTLED_LIGHTNING_RELIC.title: Bottled Lightning
BOTTLED_LIGHTNING_RELIC.description: Upon pickup, choose a [gold]Skill[/gold] in your [gold]Deck[/gold] to [gold]Enchant[/gold] with [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple].
BOTTLED_TORNADO_RELIC.title: Bottled Tornado
BOTTLED_TORNADO_RELIC.description: Upon pickup, choose a [gold]Power[/gold] in your [gold]Deck[/gold] to [gold]Enchant[/gold] with [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple].
bustedCrown.title: Busted Crown
bustedCrown.description: Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the start of your turn. Future card rewards have [blue]2[/blue] fewer cards to choose from.
bustedCrown.flavor: The Champ's crown... or a pale imitation?

coffeeDripper.flavor: "Yes, another cup please. Back to work. Back to work!" - The Architect

fusionHammer.flavor: Once wielded, the owner can never let go.

runicCube.description: Whenever you lose HP, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.

sacredBark.flavor: A bark rumored to originate from the World tree.

slaversCollar.description: During Boss and Elite combats, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the start of your turn.
